CustomField.description: Onboarding Webinar Date or SaaS 1:1 Onboarding Call Date from the SaaS CW Opportunity related to the CF record. 04/10/23 - Flagged to be deprecated (Sprint 5 - 2023)

CustomField.label: x_Original Setup Call Date
